resources.string: add some item to float ball menu
apply display over other permission first
Failed to enter the settings page, please set it manually
XoDos was unable to install the bootstrap packages.
"XoDos cannot be installed on portable/external/removable sd card on your device. Bootstrap binaries compiled for have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:%1$s."
"XoDos can only be run as the primary user. Bootstrap binaries compiled for have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:%1$s."

"Dynarec building BigBlock

0 : Don't try to build block as big as possible
1 : Build Dynarec block as big as possible
2 : Build Dynarec block bigger (continue when block overlaps, but only for blocks in elf memory)
3 : Build Dynarec block bigger (continue when block overlaps, for all types of memory)"
Defines the max allowed forward value when building Block

Handling of flags on CALL/RET opcodes

0 : Treats CALL/RET as if it never needed flags (faster, unstable)
1 : Most RET will need flags, most CALLS will not
2 : All CALL/RET will need flags (slower)

"Simulation of Strong Memory model

0 : Don't try anything special
1 : Enable some Memory Barrier when writing to memory (on some MOV opcode)
2 : All 1 plus a Memory Barrier on every write to memory using MOV
2 : All 2 plus Memory Barrier when reading from memory and on some SSE/SSE2 opcodes"
Defines whether or not Dynarec will wait for the FillBlock to be ready
Use of Float/Double for x86 emulation
Can only run from Termux activity
"Warning ⚠️ This will remove❌the Wine with its files from the App and won't be recovered.⚠️But will free some storage space. Continue?"
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Are you sure you want to delete the Wine prefix? This cannot be undone.
Do you want to download the selected profiles?
Do you want to duplicate this container?
Do you want to duplicate this preset?
Do you want to duplicate this profile?
Do you want to end this process?
Do you want to remove this container?
Do you want to remove this controller?
Do you want to remove this preset?
Do you want to remove this profile?
Do you want to remove this shortcut?
Do you want to remove this wine version?

WineD3D is a translation layer for DirectX 1-11 to OpenGL.

DXVK is a translation layer for Direct3D 9-11 to Vulkan.

D8VK is a translation layer for Direct3D 8 to Vulkan.

CNC DDraw is an implementation of DirectDraw for better compatibility with classic games.
once turn this on, unlocking sliding app content and some other functions will be moved to float ball menu
%1$s requires `allow-external-apps` property to be set to `true` in `%2$s` file.
The %1$s (%2$s) app is not installed or is disabled.
Attempted to ask for permissions that have not been requested in app manifest: %1$s
Attempted to check for permissions that have not been requested in app manifest: %1$s
Failed to create pinned shortcut for \"%1$s\"
Failed to create static shortcut for \"%1$s\"

%1$s requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start activities and services from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Android Settings -> Apps -> %1$s -> Advanced -> Draw over other apps. The permission name may be different on different devices, like on Xiaomi, its called \"Display pop-up windows while running in the background\", check https://dontkillmyapp.com for device specific issues.
XoDos requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start terminal sessions from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Settings -> Apps -> XoDos -> Advanced
"Exception received while to executing \"%1$s\" app shell command. Exception: %2$s"
"Exception received while to executing \"%1$s\" termux session command. Exception: %2$s"
An executable can only be executed if its under the following directories: %1$s
Executable not set \"%1$s\" for shell command
Execution has been cancelled since execution service is being killed
Failed to execute \"%1$s\" app shell command
Failed to execute \"%1$s\" termux session command
Failed to request permissions with request code %1$d: %2$s
Failed to get package context for the \"%1$s\" package. This may be because the app package is not installed or it has different APK signature from the current app.
The \"%1$s\" package is targeting targetSdkVersion %2$d and is running on android sdk %3$d but has not set requestLegacyExternalStorage to true in app manifest
The icon file is not a regular file but is instead a \"%1$s\".
The icon is not under the following directories: %1$s
Could not find WINEPREFIX in wine_path.conf ⚠️
The executable is null or empty.
Visit %1$s for more info on RUN_COMMAND Intent usage.
Invalid execution command runner to RunCommandService: `%1$s`
Sending SIGKILL to process on user request or because android is killing the execution service
Storage permissions are required for installation.
The Termux:Styling Plugin App is not installed.
The Termux app (package context) is not accessible.

The Termux app $PREFIX directory is not accessible by the %1$s app. This may be because you have not installed or setup Termux app or Termux app and %1$s app both have different APK signatures because you have managed to install both apps from different sources. It may also be because Termux $PREFIX directory \"/data/data/com.termux/files/usr\" does not exist or does not have read, write and execute permissions.
Shell name not set but `%1$s` shell create mode passed
Invalid execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Failed to start TermuxService while app is in background due to android bg restrictions.
Failed to start TermuxService. Check logcat for exception message.
Unsupported execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command shell create mode to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Here you can set value of extra-keys variable like in Termux app (read this) and more (e.g. META).
⁉️ Failed to open %1$s.exe try opening it inside the Desktop mode
the file can not been write to desiginated path
the file has been over written

"Supported Files:
• ISO/XISO files: - List contents with 7z - Extract contents to new folder - Open with Xbox emulator - Convert to Xbox ISO format
• CUE/BIN files (PS1): - List contents with 7z - Extract contents to new folder - Open with PS1 emulator
• Archive files (.7z, .rar, .zip, .tar, .gz): - List contents with 7z - Extract contents to new folder
• EXE files: - Run with Wine Windows emulator - Create desktop shortcuts
• TAR.XZ/TAR.GZ files: - Restore/install system archives to XoDos
• Copy/Paste: - Long press any file/folder for options - Choose Copy - Use Paste button to paste in current folder"

"Launch with %1$s?
You can change the Wine type in XoDos Settings."
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

"⚠️Your system is Android 11 or above.
To prevent app termination, please disable🛑Phantom Process Killer:
%s"
Add termux debug info to report?
This shortcut is invalid - remove and add again.

"Android battery optimizations should be disabled for the Termux:X11 app so that… Check https://developer.android.com/about/versions/oreo/background for more info and https://developer.android.com/guide/components/foreground-services#background-start-restrictions for more info.
Also check https://dontkillmyapp.com for info on vendor specific app killers. Depending on vendor you may need to do things like enable AutoStart, disable DuraSpeed, enable `Display pop-up windows while running in the background` for the app."

"The Termux:Widget app does not require a launcher activity/icon to function. You can optionally disable the launcher activity if you want and enable it again from the main activity if required.
The launcher activity is an alias for the current main activity of the app which can still be opened after disabling the launcher activity. The main activity can be opened from `Termux app settings` -> `Termux:Widget` -> `Open App` if the option has been implemented in your installed Termux app version. Otherwise, running the `am start %1$s/%2$s` command in the Termux app should open it.
Note that on some devices the widgets created on launcher home may not function properly if the launcher activity is disabled and if the widgets have reverted to their default view and show the Open Termux:Widget app to refresh widget message, then opening the launcher/main activity will be necessary to refresh the widgets. Additionally, if the launcher activity has been disabled and the widget is in the default view, then clicking the widget title may crash your launcher."

The display over other apps permission should be granted to Termux:X11 app for starting foreground activities from background. Check https://developer.android.com/guide/components/activities/background-starts for more info.

Dynamic shortcuts will normally show when long holding the Termux:Widget app launcher icon and in launcher searches results. To create dynamic shortcuts, put desired scripts/binaries in `%1$s` with the Termux app and then click the create shortcuts button.
Only %1$d shortcuts allowed. Check Termux:Widget github for how to increase limit

"The current max static and dynamic shortcuts limit for the Termux:Widget app is %1$d.
Check %2$s for info on how to change the limit."
Close down existing ones before creating new.
No Termux widgets found to refresh

"To manually refresh all widgets to show updated shortcuts, click the refresh button.
This may also be needed in some cases after app updates where widgets revert to their default view and become non-responsive and show the Open Termux:Widget app to refresh widget message instead of showing the shortcuts. In this state, the refresh buttons of the widgets itself will not work. Just launching the Termux:Widget app will also refresh the widget."
Open Termux:Widget app to refresh widget

"If you want to report this issue, then copy its text from the options menu (3-dots on top right) and post an issue on one of the following links.
If you are posting a Termux app crash report, then please provide details on what you were doing that caused the crash and how to reproduce it, if possible.
If you are posting an issue on GitHub, then post it in the repository at which the report belongs at. Issues opened or emails sent with **(partial) screenshots** instead of copied text or a file of this report **will likely be automatically closed/deleted**. You may optionally remove any device specific info that you consider private or don't want to share or that is not relevant to the issue.
We do not provide support for any hacking related tools/scripts. Any questions asked about them over email, on GitHub or other official termux community forums **will likely be automatically closed/deleted** and may even result in **temporary or permanent** ban. Check %1$s/wiki/Hacking for details."

"**Report Truncated**
Report is too large to view here. Use `Save To File` option from options menu (3-dots on top right) and view it in an external text editor app.
##
"
Requesting to create pinned shortcut for \"%1$s\"
Requesting to create static shortcut for \"%1$s\"
Using file at `%1$s` as shortcut icon file
The storage permission granted by user on request
The storage permission not granted by user on request
The storage permission must be granted to Termux:X11 app to...
The Termux is required by the %1$s app to run termux commands.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Your phone does not grant floating window permission, please enable it and try again
No PRoot distro found. Please install xodos Proot first.
XoDosexecute arbitrary commands within environment and access files

"⚠️ Android 11+ may kill background processes.
Follow the guide below to disable the Phantom Process Killer using one of the links."
Visit %1$s for more info on plugin usage.

"Termux:Widget is a plugin app for the Termux app.
Check Termux app github %1$s and Termux:Widget app github %2$s for more info."
Show app in picture-in-picture mode when home button or recents button is pressed
Reseed screen while soft keyboard is open
The screen size will be adjusted while Soft Keyboard is open.
Adjust display height for extra keys bar
May cause screen flickering during toggling EK bar.
Adjust the set resolution to fit screen orientation
Samsung Dex only. Allows interception of Alt+F4, Meta+D, Meta+E, etc.
Enable Accessibility service for intercepting system shortcuts manually.
Enable Accessibility service for intercepting system shortcuts automatically.
Suppresses suggestions, predictive typing and CJK languages
Allows you to use Dex shortcuts while intercepting. Requires Accessibility service to work.
Toggle immersive mode in your device display
Fixes scancodes on some devices. Might cause problems with multiple layouts.
Pause key intercepting with Esc key
Capture external pointer devices when possible
Intercept all hardware pointer events. Pointer is back to Android after pressing Escape key.
Let X server handle hardware keyboard layout (with DE settings or setxkbmap).
Apply display scale factor to touchpad
Show software keyboard while hardware keyboard is connected.
Onscreen mouse buttons usable with touchpad
Stylus touch override, left, middle or right click (stylus only)
Store preferences for secondary displays separately
Open this screen on display you want to configure
Enable this option to send right or middle mouse buttons only when stylus touches the screen while the button is pressed.
Make your stylus work like a mouse. When activated, stylus will only move the cursor and send mouse clicks, ignoring pressure, angle, and tilt.
Requires display resolution mode to be exact or custom
Requires intercepting system shortcuts with Dex mode or with Accessibility service
Requires Touchscreen input mode to be Trackpad and Display resolution mode to be not native
Deactivate special keys on additional key bar after each keypress
Use long-tap to lock special keys
Press any button on your controller

Install XoDos system its going to take some time please wait after choosing control type until the app exited automatically if it stays open longer than 5 minutes close it manually and than read the error in terminal or From errors log in download folder. The installation will ask for permission please allow it and wait and have a cup of coffee,,.by XOD M.aleiwi
⚠️Changing drivers requires server and restarting Wine. Continue?
To use input feature, turn preference->keyboard->scan code on
Please select a directory to pack
select controller type for game pad
🎯 Selection Mode ON:Long press files to select
No actions available for this file type: %d
click back button open soft keyboard
Exit and stop 🛑 Wine and Desktop?
App needs storage permissions to install packages.
Disable flashes and notifications for plugin errors.
Show flashes and notifications for plugin errors. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled even if hardware keyboard is connected. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled only if no hardware keyboard is connected.
Soft Keyboard Only If No Hardware
Logs will not have entries for terminal view keys. (Default)
Logcat logs will have entries for terminal view keys. These are very verbose and should be disabled under normal circumstances or will cause performance issues.
Terminal margin adjustment will be disabled.

Terminal margin adjustment will be enabled. It should be enabled to try to fix the issue where soft keyboard covers part of extra keys/terminal view. If it causes screen flickering on your devices, then disable it. (Default)
Click URL to copy or long press to open
No URL found in the terminal.
Too much key, No more than four keys
Tap with one finger and short tap with another finger
Unable to remove this wine version
The system will now update. If XoDos is not installed, it will be installed. Are you sure?

Reinstall the bridge that the x11 server uses to communicate with termux. The installation will cause the current graphical interface to stop running and require a restart. If any file is not saved, save it and retry.
